senses.def_en: requiring the aid of another (~on, upon)
senses.example: You can't be dependent on your parents all your life.
senses.example_zh: 你不可能一辈子靠父母生活。

senses.def_en: determined, influenced, or controlled by sth. else
senses.example: Despite technical progress, food production is still completely dependent on weather.
senses.example_zh: 尽管技术进步了,食物生产仍然完全取决于天气。

derivatives: interdependent a. 互相依赖的,互相依存的

senses.example: He is economically independent. // Many colonies became independent nations in the 1950's.
senses.example_zh: 他在经济上是独立的。// 许多殖民地在 20 世纪 50 年代成了独立国家。

senses.example: an independent witness
senses.example_zh: 无偏见的证人

senses.example: a decision independent of the outcome of the study
senses.example_zh: 与研究结果无关的决定

senses.def_en: to be dependent for support, help, or supply (~on, upon)
senses.example: British weather can never be relied upon—it's always changing.
senses.example_zh: 英国的天气从来都靠不住——它在不停地变。

senses.def_en: to place or have faith or confidence
senses.example: You can rely on me to keep your secret.
senses.example_zh: 你尽管相信我一定为你保密。

senses.example: John is very reliable; if he says he'll do something he will do it.
senses.example_zh: 约翰非常可靠,他说过要做的事就一定会做。

senses.example: a poor attendance record
senses.example_zh: (学生)糟糕的出勤记录

senses.example: There was a large attendance at the party.
senses.example_zh: 参加聚会的人很多。

senses.example: Now that the patient is out of danger, the doctor is no longer in attendance.
senses.example_zh: 既然病人已经脱离险境,医生就不在身边护理他了。

senses.example: a flight attendant
senses.example_zh: 客机上的乘务员

senses.def_en: accompanying or following as a result
senses.example: One of the attendant difficulties is lack of sleep.
senses.example_zh: 随之而来的困难之一是睡眠不足。

entries.mnemonic: as(to)+sist(站立)→站在旁边,可随时出手“相助”

senses.def_en: to give help to, esp. as a subordinate or supplement
senses.example: Usually there would be a group of nurses assisting the doctor in performing the surgery. // They asked her to assist with their children.
senses.example_zh: 医生做外科手术时通常会有一组护士协助。// 他们请她帮助照料孩子。

senses.example: He gave me an assist with the housework.
senses.example_zh: 他帮我做了点家务。

senses.example: The family has lived on government aid for two years.
senses.example_zh: 两年来这家人就靠政府的救济生活。

senses.example: visual aids
senses.example_zh: 视觉辅助器

senses.def_en: to provide what is useful or necessary
senses.example: He will go to aid those earthquake victims.
senses.example_zh: 他要去援助那些地震受害者。

senses.def_en: free from risk of loss; safe
senses.example: Keep your money in a secure place.
senses.example_zh: 把钱存放在安全可靠的地方。

senses.example: Check that joints are secure and the wood is sound. // a secure job
senses.example_zh: 检查接头是否牢固,木头是否完好。// 一份稳定的工作

senses.example: have one's mind secure
senses.example_zh: 放心
